---
mode: agent
description: Audit a component or diff for consistent application of the design system — colors, typography, spacing, icons, and animation.
---

Review the specified component(s) or recent changes for design system compliance. Check that all colors reference tokens (not hardcoded values), typography follows the defined scale, spacing uses defined Tailwind classes, icons are from Phosphor only, and animations use Framer Motion within the 200–300ms budget. Return a checklist score and list of violations with corrections.
